ENAE488

ENAE499

Topics in Aerospace Engineering (ENAE488W - Design of Remotely Piloted Vehicles) Elective Research 1

1 Repeatable to 6 credits

Other Requirements for the Major See https://academiccatalog.umd.edu/undergraduate/colleges-schools/ engineering/ (https://academiccatalog.umd.edu/undergraduate/ colleges-schools/engineering/) for minimum grade requirements in key prerequisite courses for engineering students. Students should follow the sequence of courses as outlined in the aerospace engineering degree requirements and graduation plan.

GRADUATION PLANS Click here (https://eng.umd.edu/advising/four-year-plans/) for roadmaps for graduation plans in the A. James Clark School of Engineering.

Additional information on developing a graduation plan can be found on the following pages:

http://4yearplans.umd.edu

the Student Academic Success-Degree Completion Policy (https:// academiccatalog.umd.edu/undergraduate/registration-academic- requirements-regulations/academic-advising/#success) section of this catalog
